title: Macrohystrix californica
intro: Macrohystrix californica, also known as California prickly poppy or California prickly pear, is a type of cactus plant native to the southwestern United States. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Macrohystrix californica include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of fever and sore throat.
